note: Legal page. First bodyBlock is the 'Last updated' line. External links preserved 1:1.

fields.title: Privacy Policy | SUPER.TENNIS
fields.metaDescription: SUPER.TENNIS Privacy Policy: the anonymous analytics we collect, third-party cookies, affiliate-link tracking, and your rights.
bodyBlocks: Last updated: March 31, 2026
1. Information We Collect

SUPER.TENNIS does not require user registration. We collect anonymous analytics data (page views, country, device type, session behavior) through the services listed below. No personally identifiable information such as names, emails, or addresses is collected or stored.
2. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
Our website uses cookies and similar technologies from third-party services for analytics, performance monitoring, and affiliate link tracking. These include:

• Cloudflare Analytics — anonymous page view and performance metrics. Privacy-focused, no personal data collected.
  • Microsoft Clarity — session recordings and heatmaps to understand how visitors interact with our site. Clarity may collect anonymized behavioral data including mouse movements, clicks, and scrolls. Subject to Microsoft's Privacy Statement.
  • Skimlinks — automatically converts product links into affiliate links. Skimlinks may set cookies to track clicks and attribute purchases. Subject to Skimlinks Privacy Policy.
  • Amazon Associates — affiliate tracking cookies are set when you click Amazon product links. These cookies help attribute purchases to our site. Subject to Amazon's Privacy Notice.
3. Affiliate Links & Commissions

Some articles on SUPER.TENNIS contain affiliate links. When you click these links and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This helps support our free content. Affiliate links are clearly disclosed at the top of articles that contain them.
Our affiliate partners include Amazon Associates, Skimlinks, Tennis Fitness, and Impact.com (Ticketmaster). These services may use cookies to track referrals.
4. Third-Party Services
Our website embeds content and uses services from third parties:

• YouTube — for video content. Subject to Google's Privacy Policy.
  • Bluesky — for social updates. Subject to Bluesky's Privacy Policy.
  • Cloudflare — for hosting, CDN, and analytics. Subject to Cloudflare's Privacy Policy.
  • Supabase — for content database. No user data is stored.
  • FlagCDN — for country flag images.
  • Impact.com — for affiliate program tracking (Ticketmaster). Subject to Impact.com Privacy Policy.
5. Data Storage
We do not store personal data. Article and player data is stored in a secure database (Supabase) and does not contain user information.
6. Children's Privacy
Our Website is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
7. Data Security
We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption and Cloudflare's security services to protect data in transit.
8. Your Rights

You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time. Note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of some features. Since we do not collect personal data, there is no personal information to access, correct, or delete. If you have concerns, please contact us.
9. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
10. Contact
For questions about this Privacy Policy, please visit super.tennis.
